product: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.1 now available as a Databricks-hosted foundation model
tagline: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.1 a Databricks hosted foundation model.
what_it_does: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.1 a Databricks hosted foundation model. You can access this model using Foundation Model APIs pay per token. This article provides an overview of Foundation Model APIs on Databricks.
why_it_matters: Provisioned throughput: This mode is recommended for all production workloads, especially those that require high throughput, performance guarantees, fine tuned models, or have additional security requirements.
plain_summary: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.1 a Databricks hosted foundation model. You can access this model using Foundation Model APIs pay per token.
key_takeaway: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.1 a Databricks hosted foundation model.
